text:
The Yugi Card (ユウギカード, Yuugi Kādo) is a rare card found in Midonite. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Item Description

A card from a card game. It has been used quite a bit.

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

 Note: Events occurring in Altar of Dragon Vein do not constitute canon material. Furthermore, some events may slightly differ depending on the current player character. 

When the Hunter group returns to Zegin's Mansion, they find a mysterious card with aura traces on it. However, Killua notes that it has a different design from Hisoka's playing cards. Hisoka himself confirms it is not his, implying someone else uses them. The group decides to keep it just in case.

During the post-game events, after Ogyu attacks Gon and Killua in Wollow Forest, Ogyu pulls out a game card. This has Gon quickly recall the card they had previously found in the mansion. He promptly hands it over to him.

Trivia

Intertextuality and References

The card's name clearly references the protagonist of the Yu-Gi-Oh! manga series, Yugi Mutou.
